Transformation fiction are stories about the acts of transforming people into other beings, objects, the opposite gender, age regression and mind/body swaps.

Most TF stories share a few characteristics. They involve a human (of either gender) being transformed into another form or object.

The most popular seem to be transformation or body swap into the other gender man-to-woman and their experiences as the other sex, also people turning into articles of clothing and being worn, washed and put away for re-use.

The means of transformation are varied and include viruses or strange chemicals, machines, pills, potions, magic spells or curses.

The transformation can be non-consensual, with the transformer often becoming confused, scared, or angry as the changes take place, although some transformations are gladly accepted and even chosen by the individual.

image by Poserposter

more about Transformation =>

Links

  • Dollstories

    Stories of transformations into Dolls, Lovedolls, Realdolls, Rubberdolls, androids; maid-bots being transformed or wanting to become a doll/android. Sister site to here.

  • Giantess Stories

    The BIG sister site to Transformation Stories, where people are shrunk, transformed into objects and dominated by giant women

  • Transformation Story Archive

    Story archive with dozens of TG/TS stories. The site also archives other transformation stories including animal, mythical beasts, furry creatures, various universes, and unclassified stories.

  • New Existence - Transformation into objects

    Weblog on transformation into objects; great stories; images and captions.

  • The Changing Mirror

    Online forum for transformation stories, role plays and chat

  • Once I Was A Man

    Weblog where people become girly objects -like it or not.

  • Cobalt Jade

    A transformation story site mainly concerning Statuary eg: a beautiful princess is transformed into a statue. Well written by a talented erotic author.

  • TG/CD Stories

    Cross-dressing, transgender and feminization stories, this sites little sissy sister.

  • Fictionmania

    Here you will find a rich and detailed website encompassing a wide range of transgender fiction. Over 12000 stories.

  • TranniesInTrouble

    Crossdressing Bondage featuring Sandra Gibbons and all her tranny friends helplessly bound and gagged. If you like sexy tranny girls in bondage this is the place to be.

  • House of Gord

    Prepare yourself for the ultimate in restraint, trussing, cocooning, human furniture, packaged girls and suspension presented at the House of Gord ultra bondage experience.

Buy all of your Sex Toy goodies and support the Plaza
Warning

These stories concern people in situations where they may be transformed into another sex, object or thing either consensually or not. They may contain sexual acts and are therefore adult in nature. If acts of Transformation are not for you then please don't read them.

Under no circumstances should you attempt to repeat the situations depicted in these stories. They are a work of fiction. These stories are presented here as acts of fantasy only. 

These stories remain the copyright property of their respective authors. Either the story has been licensed by the author to be posted on this site or where possible the author has been contacted to seek approval for their use, if you see your work here please let me know if you wish it removed.

Submit Stories

We'd love to see your stories posted here, think you have a story to tell or have written stories posted elsewhere.
